description_long: This object is a classic lipstick with a cylindrical form, featuring a vibrant red-orange lipstick bullet exposed above a gold-toned tube. The lower portion of the tube is encased in a sleek, glossy black base, which provides a striking contrast to the metallic gold midsection. The lipstick cap, also black and cylindrical, is shown removed and placed beside the tube in some views, indicating a standard removable design. The lipstick bullet itself is smooth and slightly pointed at the tip, ready for application. The overall finish is polished and reflective, giving the object a premium, elegant appearance. No visible branding, text, or decorative patterns are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A gold and black cylindrical lipstick with a vibrant red-orange bullet and a removable black cap, featuring a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lipstick bullet fully exposed above the gold tube, with the black base visible below.
description_view_1: Angled view with the black cap removed and placed beside the lipstick, revealing the full length of the lipstick bullet.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the smooth, pointed tip of the lipstick bullet and the seamless transition between the gold and black sections.
description_view_3: Side view with the cap placed further away, emphasizing the cylindrical shape and the glossy finish of both the tube and cap.
attribute_cap_design: Cylindrical, smooth, glossy black cap with no visible decorations or patterns.
